description_long: This is a round, teal-colored ceramic plate with a subtle decorative pattern etched into its surface. On top of the plate are several golden-brown waffles, some of which are broken into pieces, and they are generously topped with fresh strawberries and blueberries. The fruit appears plump and ripe, with the strawberries showing their green leafy tops and the blueberries having a slightly frosted appearance. The plate's surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light in a soft manner. There are visible chocolate drizzles on the plate, adding a touch of visual interest and realism. The overall presentation suggests a freshly prepared dessert or breakfast dish, ready to be served.
description: A teal ceramic plate with a decorative pattern, topped with golden waffles, strawberries, blueberries, and chocolate drizzle. The plate is glossy and visually appealing, presenting a fresh dessert or breakfast.
description_view_0: The plate is seen from above, showcasing the full arrangement of waffles, strawberries, and blueberries, with the decorative pattern and chocolate drizzle clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angled side view highlights the height of the waffle stack and the placement of fruit, with some strawberries and blueberries spilling toward the plate's edge.
description_view_2: A nearly opposite side view, showing the waffles more separated and the fruit more evenly distributed, with the plate's pattern still visible.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the back of the plate, with the fruit and waffles appearing more clustered toward the center and the chocolate drizzle more prominent.
attribute_visibility_of_markings_or_insc: Decorative pattern visible on the plate surface.
attribute_surrounding_context: No visible context; plate appears isolated on a white background.
